scenario.name: RTP Echo pause / start test UAC
scenario.send:
INVITE sip:40006@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sip:40006@[local_ip]:[local_port];tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: sip:40006@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: [cseq] INVITE Contact: sip:40006@[local_ip]:[local_port] Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=user1 53655765 2353687637 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 8 0 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000

ACK [next_url] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] [routes] From: sip:40006@[local_ip]:[local_port];tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: sip:40006@[remote_ip]:[remote_port][peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: [cseq] ACK Contact: sip:40006@[local_ip]:[local_port] Content-Length: 0
